title: City of Seattle proves liberal newspaper wrong in patriotic display for US Men's National Team
description: U.S. fans packed Seattle Stadium for the USMNT's 2-0 win over Australia, proving predictions of a lackluster patriotic atmosphere completely wrong.

title: North Carolina furniture manufacturer allegedly kills business partner hours after losing contract dispute
description: A North Carolina furniture manufacturer allegedly shot and killed his business partner hours after a court ordered him to pay $310,882.74 in a dispute.

title: Double endorsement drama: Trump backs second candidate in red state’s GOP gubernatorial runoff
description: Trump endorses both Wilson and Evette in South Carolina's GOP gubernatorial runoff, hedging his bets ahead of the high-profile Tuesday contest.

title: Two-train crash leaves 1 dead, 89 injured as emergency crews rush to chaotic scene
description: Two trains crashed into each other near Bedford, England, with an ambulance service confirming at least 1 death and over 80 people injured.

title: Los Angeles proposal to allow noncitizens to vote in local elections sparks online backlash
description: The Los Angeles City Council voted 10-5 to advance a proposal letting voters decide whether noncitizens can vote in municipal and school board elections.
